pilot_signal_strength.evidence: EqWD beta=2.0: +0.42% over Fixed WD on VGG-16-BN (91.36 vs 90.94), +0.31% on ResNet-20 (90.05 vs 89.74). Beat SWD on both architectures.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H2 (EqWD > SWD) supported on both architectures. H4 (layer-type) strongly confirmed by diagnostics. No hypothesis falsified.

path_to_full_result.evidence: beta=2.0 identified, codebase validated, full experiment plan ready. Clear path to publishable results.

novelty.evidence: Novelty score 7/10 from report. Partial overlap with Defazio 2025 but ratio deviation as scheduling signal remains novel. Crowded space.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Pilot completed in ~3 min/run. 8x RTX PRO 6000 available. Full experiments well within resource budget.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: No empirical data. Theoretical plausibility only.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Requires new implementation, new pilot, WD direction conflict unresolved.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Would add several days to timeline.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: Pilot shows small accuracy spreads (~1%). Budget equivalence finding plausible.

novelty.evidence: Novelty score 5/10. Benchmark-only paper faces reviewer skepticism.

resource_efficiency.evidence: 200 Optuna trials very expensive. Better as EqWD paper component.

key_findings: EqWD beta=2.0 is the best pilot method (+0.42% over Fixed WD on VGG-16-BN, +0.31% on ResNet-20)
EqWD beats SWD on both architectures, supporting H2 (ratio > gradient norm alone)
CWD underperforms Fixed WD on VGG-16-BN (-0.44%), suggesting binary masking hurts with BN
Alignment signal (delta_hat) near-zero for BN layers, meaningful for classifier layers -- confirms H4 (layer-type heterogeneity)
Ratio deviation signal is active and non-degenerate (r_t_std > 0.01 on majority of layers)
Higher beta yields better results: beta=2.0 >> beta=1.0 > beta=0.5
risks: Single-seed pilot: advantage could shrink or flip with more seeds
CIFAR-10 is too simple to draw definitive conclusions; CIFAR-100 and ImageNet needed
beta sensitivity not fully mapped yet (need beta=5.0 to check for over-adaptation)
Novelty margin narrower than claimed due to crowded WD scheduling space
reasons: EqWD beta=2.0 showed +0.42% best accuracy over Fixed WD on VGG-16-BN (91.36 vs 90.94)
EqWD beat SWD on both VGG-16-BN (+0.31%) and ResNet-20 (+0.40%)
All go/no-go criteria passed: ratio variance > 0.01, no divergence, accuracy within tolerance
Layer-type heterogeneity confirmed by diagnostics, validating the layer-type-aware extension
Consistent positive signal across two architectures reduces fluke probability
Research focus is FOCUSED mode: ADVANCE is appropriate for front-runner with positive pilot
next_actions: Run full CIFAR-100 experiments (7 methods x 3 seeds x 2 architectures)
Use beta=2.0 as default EqWD setting for full experiments
Run ImageNet sanity check then full ImageNet/ResNet-50 experiments
Run alignment informativeness diagnostic (H3) with k-NN MI estimator
